response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned full-stack engineer with 15+ years of experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. He has strong TypeScript/Node.js/React experience at Optilyz and RIDE, current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq, plus Java, Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB, and AWS CDK exposure. The resume shows craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and architecture ownership. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention and limited recent React depth, but the breadth and AI-agent experience make him a strong interview candidate.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS
Active AI-agent / MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq directly matches the AI agent requirement
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, code katas, workshops, and architecture ownership
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the primary stack
Vitest not mentioned (Jest/testing experience is implied but not specified)
Significant prior investment in DLang ecosystem may indicate language preferences that differ from the core stack

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
